name: tool-selection-boundary-demo-remotion
description: Remotion compositions for Tool Selection Boundary-Contrast Demo MP4 generation

scripts.render:all: npx remotion render src/index.ts FullVideo exports/full-video.mp4 && npx remotion render src/index.ts Scene1 exports/scene1-title.mp4 && npx remotion render src/index.ts Scene2 exports/scene2-naive.mp4 && npx remotion render src/index.ts Scene3 exports/scene3-resilient.mp4 && npx remotion render src/index.ts Scene4 exports/scene4-metrics.mp4
scripts.render:scene1: npx remotion render src/index.ts Scene1 exports/scene1-title.mp4
scripts.render:scene2: npx remotion render src/index.ts Scene2 exports/scene2-naive.mp4
scripts.render:scene3: npx remotion render src/index.ts Scene3 exports/scene3-resilient.mp4
scripts.render:scene4: npx remotion render src/index.ts Scene4 exports/scene4-metrics.mp4
scripts.render:full: npx remotion render src/index.ts FullVideo exports/full-video.mp4
